zh.title: 德尔菲神谕全集 - 古希腊最重要神谕所的预言与历史验证 | Oracle of Delphi
zh.description: 德尔菲神谕是古希腊最重要的神谕所，运作时间从约公元前800年至公元393年。皮提亚女祭司在阿波罗神庙传达神谕，影响了克罗伊斯、薛西斯、亚历山大大帝等历史进程。本站收录著名神谕并进行历史考证。
zh.keywords: 德尔菲神谕,皮提亚,古希腊预言,阿波罗神庙,Oracle of Delphi,Pythia,克罗伊斯,薛西斯,亚历山大大帝,希罗多德
zh.ogTitle: 德尔菲神谕全集 | Oracle of Delphi
zh.ogDescription: 古希腊最重要神谕所的著名预言收录与历史验证。涵盖克罗伊斯、薛西斯入侵、亚历山大大帝、苏格拉底等重大历史事件。
zh.twitterDescription: 德尔菲神谕：古希腊阿波罗神庙皮提亚女祭司的著名预言与历史验证，涵盖克罗伊斯、薛西斯、亚历山大等。

en.title: Oracle of Delphi - Famous Prophecies from Ancient Greece's Most Sacred Oracle | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: The Oracle at Delphi was ancient Greece's most important oracle, operating from ~800 BC to 393 AD. The Pythia priestess delivered Apollo's prophecies that shaped the fates of Croesus, Xerxes, Alexander the Great, and Socrates. Full archive with historical verification.
en.keywords: Oracle of Delphi,Pythia,ancient Greek prophecy,Apollo temple,Delphi prophecies,Croesus,Xerxes,Alexander the Great,Herodotus,Plutarch
en.ogTitle: Oracle of Delphi - Ancient Greece's Most Sacred Prophecies
en.ogDescription: Famous prophecies from the Oracle at Delphi, delivered by the Pythia priestess of Apollo. Full archive with historical verification covering Croesus, Xerxes, Alexander, Socrates, and more.
en.twitterDescription: The Oracle of Delphi: famous prophecies from ancient Greece's Pythia priestess, with historical verification. Croesus, Xerxes, Alexander, Socrates, and more.
